legalStructure: Series of a Delaware Statutory Trust

classification.classificationNote: USTB is treated as a tokenized Treasury fund/share-style RWA exposure. It should remain under the asset_backed profile because legal structure, fund holdings, custody, reporting, and redemption evidence are central to grading.
